title: File:Carnival_Splendor_-_San_Diego_repairs.JPG
description: The cruise ship "Carnival Splendor" docked at the 10th Ave terminal for repairs in San Diego, California, after suffering an engine room fire at sea.

visual_verification.method: Manual Read-tool inspection of the .webp by the operator (or operator-supervised agent), 2026-05-14
visual_verification.note: Alongside at San Diego with harbour tugs in foreground after the November 2010 engine-room fire incident; "CARNIVAL SPLENDOR" lettering visible on hull
